data.title: ACCESS Corrects Non-Consolidated Loss Provisions and Fiscal 2026 Results
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Access Co., Ltd. ( (JP:4813) ) just unveiled an announcement.

ACCESS CO., LTD. has announced corrections to previously disclosed figures related to non-operating income and expenses, and differences between consolidated and non-consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ended January 2026. The revisions stem from updated data reflected in its corrected consolidated financial results announced on March 30, 2026.

The company has lowered the amount of bad debt loss and allowance for doubtful accounts on loans to its U.S., European, and Taiwanese subsidiaries in its non-consolidated accounts from ¥3,871 million to ¥2,591 million, while confirming there is no impact on consolidated results. It also revised non-consolidated performance figures, showing fiscal 2026 net sales of ¥9,359 million, an ordinary loss of ¥2,538 million, and a reduced net loss of ¥3,503 million, narrowing the deficit versus the previously stated numbers and clarifying its standalone financial position for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4813) stock is a Sell with a Yen551.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Access Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:4813 Stock Forecast page.

More about Access Co., Ltd.

ACCESS CO., LTD. is a Japan-based technology company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market under securities code 4813. The company develops and provides software and network solutions, with a focus on internet, mobile, and embedded platforms for global markets including the U.S., Europe, and Asia.

Average Trading Volume: 219,015

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: Yen21.72B

data.title: Eagle Eye Confirms Leahy Family Trust Share Reorganisation With Stake Unchanged
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Eagle Eye Solutions ( (GB:EYE) ) has issued an update.

Eagle Eye Solutions has disclosed an internal share reorganisation involving non-executive director Sir Terry Leahy and his wife, Lady Alison Leahy, who have transferred portions of their Eagle Eye shareholdings into family discretionary settlement trusts. The transactions, executed off-market at nil consideration, leave the family’s total beneficial interest unchanged at 2,457,006 shares, or 8.23% of the company’s issued share capital, signalling no immediate shift in control or strategic direction for shareholders.

The announcement formalises a restructuring of ownership among Sir Terry, Lady Alison and their associated trusts rather than a disposal or new acquisition of shares. For investors, the move is primarily administrative in nature, clarifying the internal allocation of a significant existing stake while maintaining the family’s long-term alignment with Eagle Eye’s growth in AI-driven marketing and enterprise loyalty solutions.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:EYE) stock is a Buy with a £344.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eagle Eye Solutions stock, see the GB:EYE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EYE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EYE is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (robust growth and low leverage) and positive technical momentum. These strengths are offset by overbought technical signals and a demanding valuation (high P/E), which together raise near-term risk and limit upside implied by fundamentals alone.

To see Spark’s full report on EYE stock, click here.

More about Eagle Eye Solutions

Eagle Eye Solutions Group PLC is a leading provider of applied AI for marketing, delivering personalised, real-time customer engagement at scale for retail, travel and hospitality brands worldwide. Its cloud-native, API-based platform powers large-scale loyalty and promotions programmes, executing more than 1 billion personalised offers weekly and managing over 700 million loyalty wallets for major clients including Tesco, Carrefour, Woolworths Group and others.

Average Trading Volume: 46,525

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £92.56M

data.title: Park Medi World Files SEBI Demat Compliance Certificate for March Quarter
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Park Medi World Limited ( (IN:PARKHOSPS) ).

Park Medi World Limited has submitted to the stock exchanges the necessary compliance certificates under Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company’s registrar, Kfin Technologies, confirmed that all details of shares dematerialised or rematerialised during the period have been duly provided to the exchanges, underscoring the company’s adherence to regulatory reporting standards and maintaining transparency for investors.

These filings indicate continued alignment with depository and listing requirements, which is important for safeguarding shareholder interests and ensuring smooth settlement of trades in the company’s securities. By keeping its records updated with the depositories and exchanges, Park Medi World supports orderly market operations in its shares and reinforces its compliance track record in India’s capital markets.

More about Park Medi World Limited

Park Medi World Limited, which trades under the symbol PARKHOSPS, is a listed company operating in the healthcare and hospital services sector. Its equity shares are listed on both BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India, with Kfin Technologies Limited acting as its registrar and share transfer agent for securities-related services.

Average Trading Volume: 145,410

data.title: Symphony International Sets AGM to Renew Share Buyback Authority
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Symphony International Holdings ( (GB:SIHL) ) just unveiled an update.

Symphony International Holdings has called its annual general meeting for 29 April 2026 in Singapore, where shareholders will receive the annual report and financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025. The meeting will also consider an ordinary resolution renewing the company’s authority to make market purchases of up to 14.99% of its own shares at prices tied to prevailing market values.

The proposed buyback mandate, which would run until the next annual general meeting, gives the board additional flexibility to manage the capital structure and respond to any discount between the share price and underlying asset value. Detailed instructions are set out for shareholders and depository interest holders on appointing proxies, using the CREST system, and obtaining representation to vote, underscoring the company’s efforts to facilitate broad investor participation.

More about Symphony International Holdings

Symphony International Holdings is an investment company listed in London that focuses on private equity-style investments across Asia. The firm typically targets consumer-related sectors and growth businesses in the region, aiming to create long-term value through active portfolio management and selective capital allocation.

Average Trading Volume: 86,806

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Reabold Raises £3.41m in Oversubscribed Placing to Fund Gas Investments
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Reabold Resources ( (GB:RBD) ) just unveiled an update.

Reabold Resources, an investing company focused on strategic gas projects for European energy security, has conditionally raised £1.51 million via an oversubscribed placing of 1.51 billion new shares at 0.1 pence, alongside a previously announced strategic investment. In total, the fundraising amounts to £3.41 million before expenses, supporting its portfolio of low-risk, high-upside gas developments in the UK and continental Europe and potentially strengthening its balance sheet and capacity to pursue further projects.

The capital raise remains subject to shareholder approval at a general meeting scheduled for 24 April 2026, with a circular and notice of meeting to be posted by 8 April. Admission of the new shares to trading on AIM is expected around 27 April 2026, after which Reabold’s issued share capital will rise to 13.6 billion ordinary shares, altering the company’s ownership base and voting structure for existing and new shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:RBD) stock is a Hold with a £0.09 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Reabold Resources stock, see the GB:RBD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RBD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RBD is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (zero revenue, ongoing losses, and cash burn), despite a low-debt balance sheet. Technicals are supportive with strong momentum, but extremely overbought signals increase pullback risk. Valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on RBD stock, click here.

More about Reabold Resources

Reabold Resources is a UK-based upstream oil and gas investment company focused on low-risk energy projects with high upside potential. It targets strategic equity stakes in proven but undeveloped gas discoveries with significant resources and near-term production potential, mainly in the UK and continental Europe, aiming to support European energy security while generating valuation uplift for investors.

NIB Holdings Ltd ( (AU:NHF) ) has provided an update.

Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group, Inc. has lodged a notice stating it has ceased to be a substantial holder in NIB Holdings Limited, an Australian-listed health insurer and financial services provider. The change reflects a series of share transactions, largely executed through entities controlled by Morgan Stanley, that have reduced Mitsubishi UFJ’s voting interest below the substantial holding threshold, signalling a shift in NIB’s shareholder base and potentially altering the influence of major institutional investors on the company.

data.title: Revolver Resources Calls May EGM and Moves to Digital Meeting Materials
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

Revolver Resources Holdings Ltd ( (AU:RRR) ) just unveiled an update.

Revolver Resources Holdings Ltd has called an Extraordinary General Meeting of shareholders to be held in person in Brisbane on 4 May 2026 at 11:00am AEST. The company is shifting to predominantly electronic distribution of meeting documents, directing investors to its website and ASX announcements page, while providing hard copies only to those who have expressly elected to receive them.

Shareholders are being strongly encouraged to participate by lodging proxy forms ahead of the proxy cut-off time, with multiple submission channels offered including online, mail, fax, QR code and in-person delivery via Automic. The company stresses the importance of reading the meeting materials in full and urges investors who are uncertain about how to vote to seek professional advice, underscoring a focus on governance, regulatory compliance and broad shareholder engagement.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:RRR) stock is a Hold with a A$0.07 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Revolver Resources Holdings Ltd stock, see the AU:RRR Stock Forecast page.

More about Revolver Resources Holdings Ltd

Revolver Resources Holdings Ltd is an Australian company listed on the ASX under the ticker RRR. The company operates in the resources sector, with its activities managed from its headquarters in Brisbane, Queensland, and maintains an active shareholder base engaged through ASX disclosures and company communications.

data.title: Cairn Homes Executives Boost Stakes Through Bonus Deferral and LTIP Awards
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cairn Homes ( (GB:CRN) ) has issued an update.

Cairn Homes has disclosed several director and senior management share transactions, including purchases of ordinary shares by chief executive Michael Stanley and chief financial officer Richard Ball on Euronext Dublin, funded through the mandatory deferral of a portion of their 2025 bonus awards. The company has also made conditional awards of shares under its Long Term Incentive Plan to Stanley, Ball and company secretary Tara Grimley, further aligning executive remuneration with future performance and shareholder interests.

The bonus-linked share purchases at €2.15 per share, alongside substantial nil-cost conditional grants made outside a trading venue, underscore Cairn Homes’ continued use of equity-based incentives to retain key leaders and link pay to long-term value creation. These disclosures, made under EU market abuse regulations, provide investors with additional transparency on insider dealings and the scale of management’s equity exposure to the group’s performance.

More about Cairn Homes

Cairn Homes plc is an Irish homebuilder focused on developing residential properties, primarily new-build housing and apartments for the domestic market. Listed on Euronext Dublin, the company operates within the broader European real estate and construction sector, with a focus on large-scale housing delivery in Ireland.

See more data about CRN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An announcement from Image Resources NL ( (AU:IMA) ) is now available.

Image Resources NL has applied to the Australian Securities Exchange for quotation of an additional 278,179 ordinary fully paid shares. The new securities, issued on 2 April 2026, arise from the exercise or conversion of existing options or other convertible securities, modestly increasing the company’s quoted share capital and potentially broadening its investor participation.

The incremental share issuance reflects ongoing capital management activities rather than a major strategic shift, but it slightly dilutes existing holders while providing additional equity on market. This move maintains Image Resources NL’s access to equity markets and may support future funding flexibility for its resource development initiatives.
